daily_summary.headline: Routine Launches and No Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-35
top_events.description: A batch of 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.

top_events.title: Minotaur IV | STP-S29A
top_events.description: STP-S29A is a mission under the U.S. Department of Defense's Space Test Program (STP) that will deliver technology demonstrations to orbit.

top_events.title: Long March 8 | Unknown Payload
top_events.description: Launch of Long March 8 with an unknown payload, likely communication satellites.
